title: 7 of the Top Franchise Stocks to Buy Now
text: As the market's volatility continues, franchise stocks might be one of the best under-the-radar categories for investors to make money. The post 7 of the Top Franchise Stocks to Buy Now appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Rollins (ROL) Matches Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: Rollins (ROL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 3.27%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Rollins Stock Falls On Mixed Q4 Results
text: Rollins Inc (NYSE: ROL) reported fourth-quarter FY21 sales growth of 11.9% year-on-year, to $600.34 million, beating the analyst consensus of $585.03 million. Adjusted EPS of $0.14 missed the analyst consensus of $0.15.

title: Reasons to Retain Rollins (ROL) Stock in Your Portfolio
text: Rollins (ROL) is currently benefiting from its balanced approach to organic and inorganic growth.

title: 3 Stocks to Gain From the Flourishing Building Maintenance Industry
text: With manufacturing and service activities gathering steam and the construction business reviving, the Zacks Building Products - Maintenance Service industry is poised to prosper. LMB, ABM and ROL are three well-placed stocks to ride this demand strength.
